message:
chore(beads): sync status metadata on 4 review beads after fix landings

Routine 4-line beads metadata reconciliation sync. Three of the
updated records reflect status flips to `closed` matching the
landing commits earlier in this sweep; one records a follow-up
field update on a still-open bead. No issue bodies changed; line
count unchanged (4 lines modified, 0 insertions, 0 deletions).

Records touched:
- `flywheel_connectors-2h9au` (fcp-cbor canonicalize_map key-
  buffer cap) — metadata sync only; bead remains under tracked
  follow-up (paired duplicate br-w1098 is the authoritative
  record).
- `flywheel_connectors-9ftlo` (fcp-host preflight / simulate
  X-Principal threading) — closed; close_reason points at commit
  746a1e38.
- `flywheel_connectors-tlspb` (fcp-store coverage reads take
  whole-store write locks) — metadata sync only; bead remains
  open pending the fcp-store lock-granularity follow-up.
- One additional metadata-only line update on a previously
  closed record.
